subcodes.title: Words to some children spoken in Oct. 1912
subcodes.first_line: You are all my grandchildren. I feel the utmost joy to be present here with you, especially to be surrounded with such radiant children.
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @unity in diversity, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @growth of the Cause, @symbolism, @praise and encouragement
